description: Business letter in Arabic script from Faraḥ b. Ismāʿīl in Alexandria to Menashshe b. David, Fustat. Dating: October 22, 1050 (Gil). Faraḥ is worried because of the absence in letters from his father. He writes to his father’s neighbor and business partner, Menashshe. Faraḥ mentions details about sending dinars to Fustat for exchange, as well as information about the movement of ships and shipments of goods. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #500) VMR
description_he: מכתב בערבית מאלכסנדריה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
